label: 第44話
title_official: 京都姉妹校交流会－団体戦⑪－
title_search_normalized: 京都姉妹校交流会―団体戦11―
source_locator: 単行本6巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 加茂は母を守るため次期当主を目指す事情を語り、伏黒と互いの信念をぶつける。戦闘の最中に花御が乱入し、生徒たちは新たな脅威へ対応を迫られる。
summary_full: 加茂は赤血操術を継ぐ子を産めなかった正室に代わり、側室の子として当主候補に据えられた。母を守るため正しい後継者を演じる加茂は、禪院家と距離を置く伏黒にも同じ責任を求め、虎杖を殺す意思を示す。伏黒は自分の良心に従って人を選んで救うと拒絶し、新たに調伏した満象の水と鵺で攻める。加茂は赤縛で鵺を捕らえるが、花御の枝が戦場へ侵入し、狗巻は二人へ「逃げろ」と命じる。組屋が五条だけを拒む帳を下ろす。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Pressured to become the heir of the 加茂家 to protect his mother, Noritoshi believes he and 恵 are similar. 恵 rejects this and everything the sorcerer families believe in, desiring to save 悠仁 no matter what. Their ideologies and cursed techniques clash until an unexpected enemy rears it's ugly head.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " Then let's agree... to curse each other! " Noritoshi was born to a cruel father who could not get his rightful wife to give birth to a son who possessed 赤血操術 . In order to make sure the 加茂家 had an heir, Noritoshi's mother became a mistress who gave birth to a son that could become the rightful air. In order to protect his mother, Noritoshi is determined to act as the true heir. 恵 and Noritoshi continue to duel at close range but 恵's second tonfa is broken by his opponent's enhanced strength. Noritoshi expresses happiness because 恵 is growing in power but the first-year doesn't understand why they're acting familiar. Noritoshi believes the two of them will be pillars that support the sorcerer families but 恵 claims he has no connection to the Zenins. 恵 unleashes 満象 against Noritoshi. Noritoshi openly reveals that he plans to kill 悠仁 of his own will. He believes that 恵 should understand because they're the same. 恵 rejects this notion and declares that he only believes in his own conscience. Despite what anyone thinks, 恵 will save people and if Noritoshi disagrees than they should only agree to curse each other! One of the toads appears behind Noritoshi, but it's just a decoy to buy 恵 time. While his opponent is distracted, 恵 uses a large amount of 呪力 to summon a 式神 that was just recently submitted: 満象 ! Noritoshi tries to act first but he's blasted out of the temple by a torrent of water fired from 満象's trunk. While Noritoshi is swept into mid-air, 恵 calls upon 鵺 to strike him down. 恵 and Noritoshi's battle is interrupted by an enemy attack. Noritoshi is reminded of his mother's struggle and refuses to give up. He throws a blood pack at 鵺 and restrains it using 赤血操術: 赤縛 . Both boys land on the ground below and rush each other with no intention of submitting to the other. However, they're interrupted by the sudden appearance of a large mass of wooden branches. 恵 notices 棘 evading the branches and the second-year immediately uses cursed speech to tell both the boys to run away. This forces 恵 and Noritoshi to dodge the wooden spikes attempting to strike them. Just outside the battlefield, 呪詛師 鞣造 sets up a talisman and calls upon a curtain to cover the area. As the curtain begins to form, the crazed 呪詛師 gets excited to start making a hanger rack.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 加茂憲紀 伏黒恵 虎杖悠仁 (言及のみ) 狗巻棘 組屋鞣造
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 京都姉妹校交流会 呪霊討伐競争 伏黒恵 vs. 加茂憲紀 (終了) 呪霊討伐競争 伏黒恵 vs. 加茂憲紀 (終了) 伏黒恵 vs. 加茂憲紀 (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 満象 鵺 不知井底 満象 鵺 不知井底 加茂の術式 赤血操術 赤縛 赤縛 狗巻棘の術式 呪言「逃げろ」

key_events_verified_phase3: 加茂が当主候補になった事情を語る
伏黒が満象を初めて使用する
加茂が赤縛で鵺を拘束する
花御の襲撃で戦闘が中断し帳が下りる
verification_notes_phase3: 集英社公式の単行本目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第三段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
